support.title: Gargaarsa
support.description: Affeerraa waliin rakkoo ykn gaaffii yoo qabaatte, oomishaa qunnamuu dandeessa:
support.rightsDescription: Yeroo kamittuu akka seera naannoo keetti (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA ykn POPIA) odeeffannoo mataa kee balleessuu ykn erguu gaafachuu dandeessa.
support.rightsHint: Qaamolee email kee banama, qajojii duraan qophaa'een. Adreesa adriancl2001@gmail.com dabalattis barreessuu dandeessa.
support.ccpaText: Wedingo odeeffannoo mataa hin gurguru. Odeeffannoon walitti qabame affeerraa bulchuuf qofa fayyada. Jiraattuu Kaalifoorniyaa yoo ta'u, odeeffannoo kee balleessuu gaafachuu fi mirga kee fayyadamuu irraa addaan hin baafamu.
support.copyright: © {{year}} Adrián Carrasco López. Mirgoolee hundi eegamani.
support.deleteEmailBody:
Akkam,

Affeerraa armaan gadiif odeeffannoo mataa koo balleessuu gaafadha:

Maqaa geessittii:
Tookenii affeerraa (yoo beektu):

Mirga haqamuu fayyadameera (GDPR Art. 17 / CCPA / LGPD / POPIA).

Galatoomaa.
support.exportEmailBody:
Akkam,

Affeerraa armaan gadiif odeeffannoo mataa koo ergitamuu gaafadha:

Maqaa geessittii:
Tookenii affeerraa (yoo beektu):

Mirga dadarbuu fayyadameera (GDPR Art. 20).

Galatoomaa.

cookie.title: Eeyyama kuusaa
cookie.text: Wedingo kuusaa naannoo barbaachisaa affeerraa dalaguuf fayyadama (se$$ii fi filannoo kee olkaa'uuf). Kuusaa sadaffaa ykn hordoftuu hin fayyadamnu.

legal.privacyPolicy:
Itti gaafatamaa wabii: Adrián Carrasco López. Qunnamtii: adriancl2001@gmail.com. Kaayyoo: affeerraa cidhaa bulchuu, deebii mirkaneessuu fi taatee beeksisuu.

Bu'uura seeraa: eeyyama namichaa (Art. 6.1.a GDPR). Odeeffannoon fayyaa (adanyaa fi fudhachuu dhabuu nyaataa) eeyyama ifaan (Art. 9.2.a GDPR) menuu ayyaanaa cimsuuf fayyadama.

Odeeffannoo walitti qabama: maqaa, filannoo nyaataa (adanyaa fi fudhachuu dhabuu), suuraa fedhiidhaan fe'aman, odeeffannoo baankii yoo fedhiidhaan kennaman.

Fudhattoota: Google LLC (Firebase, Google Cloud Platform) Ameerikaa keessatti argama. Googiliin Sakatta'a Dambii Qajeelfama (SCC) Yuurooppiyaan Komishiniin mirkanaa'e (Murtii Raawwii 2021/914) fi Waltajjii Adeemsa Odeeffannoo (DPA) Art. 28 GDPR waliin kan walii galu qabdi. Dabalataanis, Googiliin Goodayyaa Dhuunfaa Odeeffannoo (DPF) EU-US, UK-US fi Swiizerlaand-US waliin kan walii galtu yoo ta'u, kunis geejjiba idil-addunyaa odeeffannoo eegumsa gahaa mirkaneessa.

Geejjiba idil-addunyaa: odeeffannoon kutaalee Google Cloud naannoo eur3 (Yuurooppi, Frankfurt) keessatti olkaa'ama. Odeeffannoon Ameerikaatti geejjibamu yoo barbaachise, geejjibni SCC fi DPF Googilii irratti hundaa'a.

Yeroo olkaa'umsaa: odeeffannoon geessitoota guyyaa taatee booda ji'a 12 olkaa'ama. Yeroon kun darbee booda, ofumaan balleeffama. Odeeffannoon qindaa'ina uumaa akkaawuntii dalaga ta'eetti olkaa'ama.

Mirgoolee: mirga ilaalchaa, sirreessuu, haquu, daangessuu, dadarbuu fi mormii adriancl2001@gmail.com barreessuudhaan fayyadamuu dandeessa. Geessitoootni maqaa fi affeerraa isaanii ibsuudhaan odeeffannoo isaanii balleessuu gaafachuu danda'u. Gaaffii kee guyyaa 30 keessatti deebifna.

Mirga eeyyama deebisuu: yeroo kamittuu eeyyama kee adriancl2001@gmail.com barreessuudhaan deebisuu dandeessa. Deebisuu kun eeyyama duraa fudhatamaa kan hin taane malee odeeffannoo eeyyama duraan ilaallate raawwii irratti dhiibbaa hin qabu.

Iyyannoo: mirgoolee kee sarbaman yoo feete, Bulchiinsa Eegumsa Odeeffannoo biyya kee ykn Yuurooppi Daayitaa Prootekshin Board (EDPB) qunnamuu dandeessa.

Da'imman eegumsa: Tajaajilli keenya waggaa 14 gadiif hin kennamu. Odeeffannoon da'immanii osoo walitti qabamuu yoo hubanne, hatattamaan ni balleessina.
legal.termsText:
Wedingo fayyadamuu haal-duree kana fudhachuu of keessaa qaba. Wedingo affeerraa cidhaa uumuufi bulchuuf mala.

Fayyadamaan mala karaa seeraan alaa ykn qabiyyee miidhaa erguuf fayyadamuu akka hin qabne waliigala.

Wedingo qabiyyee fayyadamaa fi geessitoootni odeeffannoo mataa isaaniitiin raawwataniif itti gaafatamaa miti.

Haal-duree kana jijjiiruuf mirga qabna. Jijjiiramoonni malaan beeksifamu.

Jiraattota Kaalifoorniyaatiif: yoo waldhabdeen haal-duree kana fi CCPA giddutti uumame, mirgoolee CCPA kennitu caalti.
legal.legalText:
Art. 10 Seera 34/2002, Adoolessa 11, Tajaajila Hawaasummaa Odeeffannoo fi Daldala Elektiroonikaa (LSSI-CE) guutuuf, beeksifama:

Itti gaafatamaa: Adrián Carrasco López
Email: adriancl2001@gmail.com
Kaayyoo weebsaayitii: mala affeerraa cidhaa mataa.

Weebsaayitichi Firebase (Google LLC) akka bu'uura keessummeessuu fi olkaa'umsaatti fayyadama, serveroota Gamtaa Yuurooppi keessatti qaba.

compliance.title: Galmee adeemsa wabii (Art. 30 GDPR)
compliance.updated: Haaromsame: Adoolessa 2026. Galmeen kun adeemsa wabii odeeffannoo mataa Wedingo keessatti galmeessa.
compliance.row1Data: Maqaa misiroota, guyyaa, bakka, ase, suuraa, muuziiqaa, menuu, kutaalee
compliance.row1Purpose: Affeerraa cidhaa uumuu fi mataa tolchuu
compliance.row2Data: Maqaa geessittii, deebii (eeyyee/lakki), filannoo menuu, adanyaa, odeeffannoo fayyaa
compliance.row5Data: Gochaalee bulchaa guddaa, tookenoota fayyadaman, affeerraa balleeffamani
compliance.internationalText: Odeeffannoon serveroota Google Cloud naannoo eur3 (Frankfurt, Jarman) keessatti olkaa'ama. Google LLC (US) akka wabiiftuutti DPA Art. 28 GDPR jalatti dalaga. Geejjibni US geessu kan bu'uureffame:
compliance.dpf: Goodayyaa Dhuunfaa Odeeffannoo (DPF) EU-US, UK-US fi Swiizerlaand-US
compliance.measureEncryption: Koodaa AES-256-GCM suuraa fi odeeffannoo nuffisaa (PBKDF2)
compliance.measureTls: Walitti hidhamiinsa HTTPS (TLS 1.3) mala hunda irratti
compliance.measureFirestore: Seera nageenyaa Firestore keessatti (bulchiinsa galtee se$$ii irratti hundaa'e)
compliance.measureStorage: Kuusaa naannoo xiqqaa fi eeyyamaan qofa
compliance.measureRetention: Imaammata olkaa'umsaa: taatee booda ji'a 12 odeeffannoo geessitootaaf
compliance.measureSuperadmin: Bulchaa guddaa Firebase Authentication + karaa dhokfamaan eegame

golden: Bareedaa fi ifaa, aksentaa warqee kan qabu.
Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Uumamaa fi sober kan magariisa lallaafaa wajjin.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: Ho'aa fi micciiramaa, halluu diimaa kan qabu.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Ifaa fi giddu galeessa, argama tasgabbaa’aa fi yeroo hin qabne kan qabu.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: Lallaafaa fi jaalalaa, sagalee bifa pilaastikii luqqisii qabu.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: Haaraa fi tasgabbaa'aa, lavender fi mauve hues wajjin.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: Ifa fi ayyaana, ibsaa warqee ho'aa qabu.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: Dukkanaa'aa fi bareedaa, amber fi warqee kan calaqqisiisan.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: Gad fagoo fi ulfaataa, warqee cimaa duubbee dukkanaa'aa irratti.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Baayyee halluu diimaa dukkanaa'aa warqee cimaa fi argama kabajaa qabu.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: Ho'aa fi kan golgaa, wayinii diimaa fi warqee kan calaqqisu.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Deep blue kan silver accents fi tasgabbaa'aa ta'e.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Magariisa uumamaa gadi fagoo kan halluu warqee fi bareedaa qabu.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Diimaa cimaa kan bifa pilaastikii fi ibsaa jaalalaa qabu.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Kabaja jaalala adda addaa halluu bokkaatiin.
Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Alaabaa tiraansiif kabaja kennuudhaaf halluu diimaa, roobaa fi adii.
Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Alaabaa baayinarii hin taaneef keelloo, adii, diimaa fi gurraacha.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: Burtukaana, adii fi roobaa alaabaa saala walfakkaataa.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Alaabaa bi bifa pilaastikii, diimaa fi halluu diimaa qabu.
Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: Alaabaa paan kan bifa pilaastikii, keelloo fi buluu.
Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Gurraacha, halluu diimaa, adii fi diimaa alaabaa saala hin qabne.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.
